summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of YouTube video looper with theme toggle and speed control features. All major functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Theme toggle switches between dark and light modes with correct sun/moon icons
Theme preference persists in localStorage across page reloads
Speed slider allows custom drag setting (tested 0.75x)
Speed display correctly shows current playback rate
All speed preset buttons (0.5x, 0.75x, 1x, 1.5x, 2x) function correctly
Active speed preset button is properly highlighted
Video loading and YouTube IFrame API integration works
All UI elements present and accessible with proper data-testid attributes
Controls work correctly in both dark and light themes
YouTube video loads and displays properly with custom controls
